---
title: "News and events"
listing:
  contents: news   # The folder Quarto will scan for .qmd files
  sort: "date desc"         # Sorts by date, newest first
  type: default             # 'default' gives a classic blog-style list; you can also use 'grid'
  categories: true          # Creates a clickable category sidebar
  sort-ui: true             # Adds a dropdown for users to change sorting
  filter-ui: true           # Adds a search bar for the news feed
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, image] # What to display on the card
format: html
---

::: {.lead}
Stay up to date with the latest developments from our group, including:
:::

* Recent thesis defenses.
* Conference presentations.
* Awards and grants.

---
